description: The Hopeful Day - family gathering things to give away
The Truck - grinding gears crushing everything
The Doubt - child looking up with puzzled eyes
The Scream - child running after the truck
Nothing He Could Do - sitting together on the ground
I Was Broken Too - parent holding child close
The Thought That Stays - pictures in the dark at bedtime
Care Finds Its Feet - writing a reuse sign together
The Parts of Us - two sides pulling and pushing
The Playful Process - equinox truck returning
The Game - playing together through mistakes
The Song Itself - singing together at the end
